title: Ars Theurgia
description: A Fabric mod that adds all kinds of ancient magic, with many paths you can take and choose along the way.
body:
# Ars Theurgia

A Fabric mod that adds all kinds of ancient magic, with many paths you can take and choose along the way.

This mod is a WIP, it was made for the FallFest 1.16, a ModFest which you can find more information about [here](https://beta.modfest.net/). Join the discord, the showcase will soon be released to the public! We plan to expand the mod and add many other paths and kinds of ancient magic to it, right now we got the beginning of the Mesopotamian path done. 

This requires the Fabric API and GeckoLib.

# Features

- Clay tablets and scrolls. You have to reconstruct these ancient grimoire to find ancient hidden knowledge of magic.
- Many new items related to ancient cultures, crucial to the proper application of rituals.
- Find ancient ruins in deserts on at the bottom of the sea which hold ancient treasure to be used in rituals, scavenge Raw Mud Blocks with the Trowel to get treasure.

![](https://i.imgur.com/z50Yt28.png "House Ruins")

- Find reports and stories hidden in structures telling the stories of ancient travelers and the average person that might help you decipher their culture and help you in ceremonies.

![](https://i.imgur.com/VpSMZa0.png "Ruin Loot")

- A diverse set of rituals, each with their own logic and progression with multiple steps and block structures with a system that is easy to expand upon.

![](https://i.imgur.com/a4FWtTd.png "This sheep is in serious trouble.")

- Many creatures which you can summon to help you based on real mythology, along with mythological tools and battle equipment.

![](https://i.imgur.com/mj8CwKh.png "Sharur, granting you the power of flight, and Imhullu, granting you the power to manipulate wind.")

**For you to begin the mod, we recommend you to scavenge pyramids and ruins and read the tablets (you need the dictionary in your inventory to read it.) It will serve as a guide to rituals and the mod progression.**

**Be careful when diving in too deep into black magic, for when you lose your path in the dark arts, eventually you will never be able to go back with the ultimate sacrifice. Consequences will exist and the gods will reject you.**

![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/725910742523576410/766442830113144872/unknown.png)
